name: Cajunized Oriental Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the pork chops with salt and red cayenne pepper.
2. Brown the pork chops slowly in a skillet.
3. Add wine, bell pepper, onion, and garlic to the skillet; cover.
4. Simmer for 25 to 30 minutes until the pork chops are cooked through.
5. Remove the pork chops from the skillet and keep them warm.
6. Stir in soy sauce and pineapple syrup (from the can).
7. Return the pork chops to the skillet and simmer until thickened.
8. Add the pineapple chunks and bring to a boil.
9. Serve over hot cooked rice.
